title: cystopteris pseudoregia
intro: Cystopteris pseudoregia, also known as the False Bladder Fern, is a species of fern native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cystopteris pseudoregia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal preparation methods.
